title: Germany to release part of oil reserve amid Middle East war
summary_full: "The markets are clearly reacting with extreme sensitivity at present because no one knows how long the Strait of Hormuz will remain impassable," the German economy and energy minister said
summary_public: "The markets are clearly reacting with extreme sensitivity at present because no one knows how long the Strait of Hormuz will remain impassable," the German economy and energy minister said
